title: New income tax rules for doctors: Who needs to maintain Form 25 and why
summary: It is a prescribed daily case register required to be maintained by practitioners of any system of medicine under Rule 46(6) of the Income Tax Rules, 2026.

title: Bank holiday today: Are SBI, HDFC Bank, and other banks closed on Saturday, May 2?
summary: Banks in India are open today, May 2, 2026, as it is the first Saturday of the month. They will be closed on May 9, May 23, and May 27 as per the RBI's holiday schedule. Online banking and ATMs remain operational during holidays.
